title: amylotheca balansae
intro: Amylotheca balansae, also known as the Red Bead Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the Philippines and the Malay Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Amylotheca balansae include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in the regions where it is native.
